name: PCI DSS v4.0.1 Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard

items.title: Install and Maintain Network Security Controls
items.description: Network security controls (NSCs) are installed and maintained to protect the cardholder data environment.

items.title: Apply Secure Configurations to All System Components
items.description: Vendor-supplied defaults and other security parameters are managed to reduce the risk of compromise.

items.title: Protect Stored Account Data
items.description: Protection methods such as encryption, truncation, masking, and hashing are used to protect stored account data.

items.title: Protect Cardholder Data with Strong Cryptography During Transmission
items.description: Strong cryptography is used to protect cardholder data during transmission over open, public networks.

items.title: Protect All Systems and Networks from Malicious Software
items.description: Malicious software (malware) is prevented, detected, and addressed.

items.title: Develop and Maintain Secure Systems and Software
items.description: Bespoke and custom software are developed securely, and security vulnerabilities in systems and software are identified and addressed timely.

items.title: Restrict Access to System Components and Cardholder Data by Business Need to Know
items.description: Access to system components and cardholder data is limited to only those individuals whose job requires such access.

items.title: Identify Users and Authenticate Access to System Components
items.description: Systems and processes are in place to identify users and authenticate access to system components.

items.title: Log and Monitor All Access to System Components and Cardholder Data
items.description: Logging mechanisms and the ability to track user activities are implemented to prevent, detect, or minimize the impact of a data compromise.

items.title: Test Security of Systems and Networks Regularly
items.description: Vulnerabilities are identified and addressed through regular security testing of systems and networks.

items.title: Support Information Security with Organizational Policies and Programs
items.description: An information security policy is established, maintained, and disseminated, and all personnel are aware of and follow it.
